params.name: MUSE Design Awards
params.description:
On Jul 22, 2015 AD, the American International Awards Association received tens of thousands of entries for the first MUSE Design Awards.
The MUSE Design Awards is one of the most influential international awards in the world's creative field. It aims to honor, promote and encourage creativity by providing a new standard of excellence for evaluating media design production and distribution. It is their strict review system and high judgment standards that attract many internationally renowned …
